patient_summary: Olivia, age 73, female (documented) with patient ID 104 and phone +1 310 556 1256. Active visit diagnoses documented 06/30/2023 include Mixed dyslipidemia (Primary), Essential hypertension, benign, Leg pain, Postoperative anemia, and Unspecified anemia. Major scheduled/recorded procedure: COLONOSCOPY, WITH BIOPSY (02/21/2025, conflicting times recorded: 8:33 AM and 9:11 AM). Notable laboratory abnormalities from 07/03/2023: Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL; Iron Saturation 15 (L) %; Chloride 108 (H) mmol/L; Anion Gap 5.0 (L) mmol/L; eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2; Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL; VLDL Cholesterol Cal 32 (H) mg/dL. Functional assessment documents difficulty walking/climbing stairs (Yes 06/14/2023) with otherwise intact vision, hearing, dressing, and cognition. Multiple care team members are listed including Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP), Kandaswamy, Shankar, MD, Guthikonda, Sasidhar, MD, and Darlington, Andrew, DO. Several demographic and social-history conflicts are present (DOB formatting, sex/legal sex/gender identity, and smoking status) retained in the record for resolution.
